title: Loki’s Chains and the Island’s Fear
description: On pages 15–17, this part follows Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, King Harald, Shanks, Unknown person #15, Franky as God’s Knights and Elbaf’s ruling tensions push the island toward open conflict while the Straw Hats and giants react to the threat.
scene: God’s Knights and Elbaf’s ruling tensions push the island toward open conflict while the Straw Hats and giants react to the threat.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You can't eat it. Harald!!! It would be the end of the world!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hurry, LOK!! No matter what happens. We can't let him lay hands on it!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...The legendary sword you gave me long ago.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I need to eat the fruit and take up ragmir...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Don't worry, my helmet saved me!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: You can't let him catch lol!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: No matter how you slice it...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: We've landed ourselves in a real pinch.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: This immortality thing isn't half bad.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is there really no way to free him from having to follow these orders?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...The forbidden Devil Fruit passed down within ElBAF?!

summary: This part advances God’s Knights Tighten Their Grip through 32 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
